title: Coffeemod
description: Adds two types of coffee with unique benefits.
body:
2 types of coffee are added to it: regular coffee and coffee with cookies. Each of them has   its own buff, regular coffee has an effect and minimal hunger replenishment, and coffee with   cookies has the same level of effects, but increased inflammation of hunger. Everyone has their  own craft, namely: coffe ![coffee-craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65043296238bb3664ed3568ccf748c9ab700ae57.png), coffe with cookies ![coffee with cookies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b96d03e0bb6c980fd577ae53838dd65f343077db.png).

And the effect of coffee is as follows: ![coffe-effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af7c5a4b6d581f9368744e3b161c1d8fd051982b.png)

This mod can help players speed up their gameplay experience by providing a range of speed-enhancing effects.
